class.name: ZipFile
class.signature: public class ZipFile extends Object implements Closeable
class.description: This class is used to read entries from a zip file. Unless otherwise noted, passing a null argument to a constructor or method in this class will cause a NullPointerException to be thrown.

constructors.name: ZipFile
constructors.description: Opens a zip file for reading. First, if there is a security manager, its checkRead method is called with the name argument as its argument to ensure the read is allowed. The UTF-8 charset is used to decode the entry names and comments.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: the name of the zip file

throws.description: if a ZIP format error has occurred
if an I/O error has occurred
if a security manager exists and its checkRead method doesn't allow read access to the file.

constructors.name: ZipFile
constructors.signature: public ZipFile(File file, int mode) throws IOException
constructors.description: Opens a new ZipFile to read from the specified File object in the specified mode. The mode argument must be either OPEN_READ or OPEN_READ | OPEN_DELETE. First, if there is a security manager, its checkRead method is called with the name argument as its argument to ensure the read is allowed. The UTF-8 charset is used to decode the entry names and comments

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: the ZIP file to be opened for reading

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: the mode in which the file is to be opened

throws.description: if a ZIP format error has occurred
if an I/O error has occurred
if a security manager exists and its checkRead method doesn't allow read access to the file, or its checkDelete method doesn't allow deleting the file when the OPEN_DELETE flag is set.
if the mode argument is invalid

constructors.name: ZipFile
constructors.signature: public ZipFile(File file) throws ZipException, IOException
constructors.description: Opens a ZIP file for reading given the specified File object. The UTF-8 charset is used to decode the entry names and comments.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: the ZIP file to be opened for reading

throws.description: if a ZIP format error has occurred
if an I/O error has occurred

constructors.name: ZipFile
constructors.signature: public ZipFile(File file, int mode, Charset charset) throws IOException
constructors.description: Opens a new ZipFile to read from the specified File object in the specified mode. The mode argument must be either OPEN_READ or OPEN_READ | OPEN_DELETE. First, if there is a security manager, its checkRead method is called with the name argument as its argument to ensure the read is allowed.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: the ZIP file to be opened for reading

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: the mode in which the file is to be opened

parameters.name: charset
parameters.description: the charset to be used to decode the ZIP entry name and comment that are not encoded by using UTF-8 encoding (indicated by entry's general purpose flag).

throws.description: if a ZIP format error has occurred
if an I/O error has occurred
if a security manager exists and its checkRead method doesn't allow read access to the file,or its checkDelete method doesn't allow deleting the file when the OPEN_DELETE flag is set
if the mode argument is invalid

constructors.name: ZipFile
constructors.signature: public ZipFile(String name, Charset charset) throws IOException
constructors.description: Opens a zip file for reading. First, if there is a security manager, its checkRead method is called with the name argument as its argument to ensure the read is allowed.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: the name of the zip file

parameters.name: charset
parameters.description: the charset to be used to decode the ZIP entry name and comment that are not encoded by using UTF-8 encoding (indicated by entry's general purpose flag).

throws.description: if a ZIP format error has occurred
if an I/O error has occurred
if a security manager exists and its checkRead method doesn't allow read access to the file

constructors.name: ZipFile
constructors.signature: public ZipFile(File file, Charset charset) throws IOException
constructors.description: Opens a ZIP file for reading given the specified File object.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: the ZIP file to be opened for reading

parameters.name: charset
parameters.description: The charset to be used to decode the ZIP entry name and comment (ignored if the language encoding bit of the ZIP entry's general purpose bit flag is set).

throws.description: if a ZIP format error has occurred
if an I/O error has occurred

methods.name: getComment
methods.description: Returns the zip file comment, or null if none.

throws.description: if the zip file has been closed

methods.returns: the comment string for the zip file, or null if none

methods.name: getEntry
methods.description: Returns the zip file entry for the specified name, or null if not found.

throws.description: if the zip file has been closed

methods.returns: the zip file entry, or null if not found

methods.name: getInputStream
methods.signature: public InputStream getInputStream(ZipEntry entry) throws IOException
methods.description: Returns an input stream for reading the contents of the specified zip file entry. Closing this ZIP file will, in turn, close all input streams that have been returned by invocations of this method.

throws.description: if a ZIP format error has occurred
if an I/O error has occurred
if the zip file has been closed

methods.returns: the input stream for reading the contents of the specified zip file entry.

methods.name: getName
methods.description: Returns the path name of the ZIP file.
methods.returns: the path name of the ZIP file

methods.name: entries
methods.description: Returns an enumeration of the ZIP file entries.

throws.description: if the zip file has been closed

methods.returns: an enumeration of the ZIP file entries

methods.name: stream
methods.description: Returns an ordered Stream over the ZIP file entries. Entries appear in the Stream in the order they appear in the central directory of the ZIP file.

throws.description: if the zip file has been closed

methods.returns: an ordered Stream of entries in this ZIP file

methods.name: size
methods.description: Returns the number of entries in the ZIP file.

throws.description: if the zip file has been closed

methods.returns: the number of entries in the ZIP file

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the ZIP file. Closing this ZIP file will close all of the input streams previously returned by invocations of the getInputStream method.

throws.description: if an I/O error has occurred
